Role.Description: Shared IAM role assumed by every Transfer Family service-managed user. Grants maximum S3 permissions any user can ever have; per-user scope-down is expected to narrow access to the user's own folder.

_note: This role sets the ceiling for what any Transfer Family user can ever do: read/write ANY customer folder. The per-user scope-down is what is supposed to slice this down to the user's own folder. If the scope-down is missing a per-user constraint, the user gets the full ceiling. This is why the role must be as narrow as practical.
